title: OpenAMP Pilot Pre-Registration
description: JSON Schema for freezing pilot experimental design before running assays. Pre-registration prevents HARKing (Hypothesizing After Results Known): once registered, pass/fail criteria cannot be changed post-hoc. Amendment policy must be documented explicitly.

packet_id.description: Identifier of the external review packet this pre-registration refers to

registered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the experimental design was frozen

registered_by.description: Name and role of the person who registered this design

items.description: Type of assay to be performed (e.g. 'MIC', 'hemolysis_RBC', 'serum_stability', 'cytotoxicity_mammalian')

assay_types.description: Types of assays that will be performed. Must have at least one assay type.

metric.description: The metric against which pass/fail is judged (e.g. 'MIC_50', 'HC50', 'selectivity_index')

threshold.description: The numerical threshold value for this criterion

direction.description: Whether passing requires the metric to be above, below, or equal to the threshold

notes.description: Optional context or justification for this criterion

items.description: A single pass/fail criterion with metric, threshold, and direction

pass_criteria.description: Pre-registered pass/fail criteria. These MUST NOT be changed after assays are run. If changes are needed, use the amendment_policy mechanism.

items.description: Description of a control condition (e.g. 'Melittin positive control (hemolytic)', 'Vehicle-only negative control')

control_conditions.description: Experimental control conditions that will be used. At least one control is required.

sample_size.description: Number of biological replicates per condition

blinding.description: Whether the experimenters will be blinded to candidate identity during assay execution

primary_endpoint.description: The primary outcome measure that will determine the study's main conclusion

secondary_endpoints.description: Secondary outcome measures (can be empty if none)

statistical_analysis_plan.description: Detailed plan for statistical analysis of the results. Must be at least 20 characters.

amendment_policy.description: Documented policy for how amendments to this pre-registration are handled. Must be explicit about what changes are allowed, who can authorize them, and how they are recorded.

pipeline_version_locked.description: The exact pipeline version used to generate candidate scores for this pilot (e.g. 'v0.5.72'). Prevents version drift from invalidating selection criteria.
